title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
